decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates the mortality impact, financial cost, and cost-effectiveness of Vietnam's national immunization programme using surveillance data and LiST.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete economic and impact evaluation of a national vaccination programme.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Performs a cost-utility analysis of a rural echinococcosis prevention programme, including cost-effectiveness and cost-saving thresholds.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete economic evaluation of a zoonotic-disease intervention.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates dengue's economic burden and costs from public-payer and societal perspectives, including adjustment for underreporting.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete infectious-disease economic-burden application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Performs a cost-effectiveness analysis comparing infant meningococcal B vaccination with non-vaccination and calculates ICERs per QALY.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete vaccine cost-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates lives saved by lockdown timing and links those effects to foregone economic activity to derive cross-country price-of-life estimates.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete joint policy-impact and economic analysis of COVID-19 interventions.

decisions.relationship_evidence: The study performs a vaccine benefit-risk analysis, not a policy-impact or economic evaluation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Benefit-risk assessment is neighboring but does not establish lineage for the assigned economic-evaluation concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Constructs pandemic containment effectiveness scores and relates them to GDP growth to evaluate whether stringent containment harms or supports economic performance.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 policy-impact application incorporating economic outcomes.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a vaccination-versus-no-vaccination model to estimate cases and deaths averted plus direct and productivity cost savings.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete global economic and public-health impact evaluation of COVID-19 vaccination.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Analyzes the effects of avian-influenza outbreaks on egg prices, but does not evaluate a policy or the economics of an intervention.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Disease-related market analysis is not a lineage lead for policy-impact or intervention economic evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses content mining and establishes a PMC-AE quantitative model for evaluating COVID-19 policy texts.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicitly develops and demonstrates a quantitative policy-text evaluation model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates attributable fractions for liver mortality due to chronic hepatitis C using spontaneous resolvers as the benchmark comparator.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete estimation of an infectious-disease burden metric.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates incidence, prevalence, and years lived with disability for 310 diseases and injuries across locations and time.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Large-scale population-burden estimation that includes infectious diseases.
named_source_mentions: Global Burden of Diseases, Injuries, and Risk Factors Study 2015

decisions.relationship_evidence: Derives DALYs and healthy life expectancy for 195 countries and uses them to track and benchmark population-health trends.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Large-scale burden and benchmarking application including communicable diseases.
named_source_mentions: Global Burden of Diseases, Injuries, and Risk Factors Study 2016

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents six epidemiological metrics for tracking progress in reducing HIV as a public-health threat.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicitly presents control metrics and benchmarks for HIV epidemic transition.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates cause-specific mortality, death rates, and years of life lost across 195 countries using standardized burden-estimation methods.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Population mortality-burden estimation includes communicable causes.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses microsimulation to estimate numbers of children affected by maternal HIV and associated population-level developmental consequences.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete model-based estimation of population burden attributable to maternal HIV.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates the demographic distribution of US vaccination-priority populations to provide benchmarks for tracking equity in vaccine coverage.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete vaccination-program coverage benchmark.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Quantifies racial and ethnic disparities in COVID-19 vaccination uptake and models alternative access scenarios.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete vaccination-control metric and disparity benchmark application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Calculates chronic HBV and HCV infection counts and uses Markov simulation to project burden through 2035.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete viral-hepatitis burden and control-progress estimation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Calculates incidence-prevalence and incidence-mortality ratios to assess HIV epidemic control nationally and across Indian states.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete application of recommended HIV epidemic-control metrics.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates cervical-cancer screening and treatment coverage from population surveys to benchmark progress toward elimination goals.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HPV-related population coverage and control-progress estimation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Estimates infant RSV prevalence and clinical outcomes and explicitly provides benchmarks for monitoring preventive-intervention effects.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete RSV burden benchmark for intervention monitoring.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops age- and gender-specific viraemia metrics and evaluates existing 95-95-95 targets as benchmarks for HIV epidemic control.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicitly presents novel HIV burden and control metrics with an applied assessment.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies multiple population-size estimation methods and triangulates their estimates for men who have sex with men in Tbilisi.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete hidden-population size estimation supporting HIV programme planning.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops the novel Bayesian Anchored Multiplier and variance-adjusted version to synthesize hidden-population size estimates.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development for population-size estimation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Triangulates population, survey, prevalence, and notification data to estimate local MSM population sizes and infection rates.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete hidden-population size estimation linked to HIV/STI planning.
supported_label_variants: estimating the size of local populations

decisions.relationship_evidence: Derives serotype-specific IgG thresholds associated with 90% reduction in infant invasive GBS disease risk as immunogenicity benchmarks.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete infectious-disease biomarker-threshold development study.
supported_label_variants: immunogenicity evaluation benchmarked against the defined thresholds

decisions.relationship_evidence: Proposes the PT80 neutralization-titer biomarker as a surrogate endpoint and vaccine-benchmarking tool.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicitly proposes a predictive HIV-prevention biomarker.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Provides a labeled face-mask image dataset designed to develop and assess detection and classification models.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicitly supplies a benchmark dataset for predictive-model development and evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops, evaluates, and externally validates the CROSS clinical score for predicting ICU admission in patients with COVID-19.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit development and validation of a new predictive score.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Establishes a predictive model and benchmark for non-lactating dairy-cow intramammary infection indicators.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit predictive-model and benchmark development for infection control.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Systematically benchmarks protein-language-model embeddings against alternative models for HIV drug-resistance prediction and validates performance across holdouts.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit performance benchmarking and validation of predictive models.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces a surgical-wound diagnosis benchmark and proposes the WoundQwen three-stage diagnostic framework.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicitly introduces a new predictive benchmark and model framework.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Presents a systematic benchmarking framework for deep-learning models used in infectious-disease diagnostics and surveillance.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological framework development with performance evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies quantile-based g-computation to estimate the joint effects of phthalate mixtures on gastrointestinal infection.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete infectious-disease application of quantile-based g-computation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses quantile-based g-computation to estimate the contributions of epidemiological, immunity, and social factors to excess mortality.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 mortality application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Employs quantile-based g-computation to estimate collective and relative contributions of risk-factor mixtures to cervical HPV infections.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HPV application of the method.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a Quantile-based G Computation model to assess mixed environmental effects on scrub-typhus incidence across age groups.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete vector-borne disease application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies quantile-based g-computation to estimate single and mixed environmental effects on HBV and HCV morbidity and mortality.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete viral-hepatitis application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Discusses when quasi-experimental designs are used for vaccine evaluation and directly examines their relative strengths, limitations, and potential biases.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological overview and guidance for quasi-experimental vaccine evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces policy-impact evaluation designs and demonstrates how their assumptions are violated in COVID-19 policy studies.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit guide to design issues, assumptions, and evidence appraisal.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Examines benefits, drawbacks, identifying assumptions, and implementation challenges of quasi-experimental methods through vaccine case studies.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological guidance for quasi-experimental pharmacoepidemiology.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses retrospective data and a simulated no-policy-change counterfactual to estimate the impact of insurance-coverage expansions on H. pylori eradication and prevalence.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete nonrandomized policy-impact evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses quasi-experimental synthetic-control and difference-in-differences analyses to estimate a vaccine-exemption policy's effects.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete quasi-experimental vaccination-policy evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Models temporal associations between policy changes and reproduction numbers but does not identify the analysis as a quasi-experimental design.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Association modelling alone is insufficient to establish lineage for the assigned quasi-experimental concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Reports a cross-sectional cohort analysis following a cluster-randomized trial, not an application of another quasi-experimental policy-evaluation design.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The described design does not match the assigned concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes a registry-based cohort comparison but does not explicitly identify or substantiate a quasi-experimental design.
decisions.lineage_evidence: The abstract does not establish a lineage lead for the assigned design category.

decisions.relationship_evidence: States that intervention impact was quantified but provides no design information supporting quasi-experimental policy evaluation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Insufficient methodological evidence for this concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a naturally occurring school-reopening threshold as a natural experiment to estimate mandatory testing's effect on reported infections.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete natural-experiment evaluation of a COVID-19 school policy.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses synthetic-control and event-study approaches to estimate indirect effects of a district-level COVID-19 mass-vaccination campaign.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete quasi-experimental vaccination-campaign evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: The study is a nonrandomized, single-arm therapeutic trial compared with predefined benchmarks, not a quasi-experimental policy evaluation.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Its benchmark clinical-trial design is outside the assigned policy-evaluation concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Explicitly conducts a quasi-experimental propensity-score analysis to approximate randomized conditions and estimate burial intervention effects on Ebola transmission.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete quasi-experimental evaluation of an Ebola-control intervention.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Randomly assigns cows with gram-negative mastitis to two treatment durations or no treatment and compares clinical outcomes.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete randomized controlled treatment evaluation for an infectious condition.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies a regression-discontinuity identification strategy based on an administrative deployment criterion to estimate teacher-training effects.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HIV-prevention programme application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Describes regression discontinuity, its implementation and causal assumptions, demonstrates an HIV application, and discusses its strengths and limitations.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit epidemiologic methodological guidance for regression discontinuity.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies an RDD exploiting birth-date variation to estimate mass polio campaign effects on routine immunization use.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete vaccination-programme application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a regression discontinuity design at the CD4 eligibility threshold to estimate immediate ART effects on retention.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HIV-care application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies RDD alongside marginal structural models to estimate ART effects on mortality and compare identifying assumptions.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HIV treatment-effect application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies regression discontinuity around national guideline changes to estimate tenofovir's effects on treatment retention.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HIV policy application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses regression discontinuity around an ART-eligibility guideline change to estimate effects on initiation and retention.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HIV treatment-policy application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: The paper provides methodological guidance and examples for RDD vaccine evaluation but does not itself originate, apply, critique, diagnose, correct, or implement the design as defined.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit guidance describing RDD features, scenarios, and future vaccine-research uses.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a quasi-experimental regression discontinuity design to estimate changes in rapid ART initiation after Treat-All adoption.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete multinational HIV-policy application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a sharp nonparametric RD design to estimate the size and duration of an antibiotic-prescribing intervention's effect.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete antimicrobial-stewardship application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses regression discontinuity at a prescribing-rate assignment threshold to evaluate repeated social-norm feedback.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete antimicrobial-stewardship intervention application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies regression discontinuity at an age-based vaccination threshold to estimate influenza-vaccine effects on hospitalization and mortality.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses regression discontinuity around a viral-load monitoring threshold to estimate guideline effects on retention and suppression.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HIV monitoring-policy application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses regression discontinuity around Sweden's 1975 BCG-policy change to estimate vaccination effects on COVID-19 outcomes.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete vaccine natural-experiment application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a quasi-experimental regression discontinuity design at Rwanda's HPV eligibility change to assess sexual behavior outcomes.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HPV vaccination-programme application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies fuzzy regression discontinuity at HPV campaign age eligibility to test effects on sexual behavior.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HPV vaccination application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses multi-fuzzy regression discontinuity to estimate COVID-19 policy-control effects across 212 countries.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 policy application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses regression discontinuity analyses to estimate laboratory-monitoring changes after Treat-All policy adoption in 26 countries.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete multinational HIV-policy application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a regression discontinuity design to estimate changes in CD4 and viral-load testing following Treat-All adoption.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete Southern African HIV-policy application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses regression discontinuity as a natural experiment to estimate universal-treatment effects on ART initiation and retention.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HIV treatment-policy application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a quasi-experimental regression discontinuity design at age-based vaccine eligibility to estimate hospitalization effects.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a quasi-experimental regression discontinuity design around an HIV regimen guideline change to assess retention.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HIV treatment-policy application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: The article introduces and discusses RDD principles, scenarios, and examples but does not itself perform or implement a study under the allowed roles.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological guidance for real-world vaccine-effectiveness evaluation using RDD.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses regression discontinuity at age-based vaccine prioritization to estimate first-dose effectiveness against COVID-19 mortality.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies regression discontinuity at the age-70 vaccination threshold to estimate influenza-vaccine effects on hospitalization and mortality.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete influenza vaccine-effectiveness application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducts regression discontinuity in time analyses to estimate vaccination-rate changes following vaccine-safety announcements.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 vaccine-policy communication application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Provides a practical RD analysis guide, empirical applications, and complete replication materials for Python, R, and Stata.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit implementation and reproduction resource for RD analyses.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Develops and validates a modified sharp regression discontinuity model that accommodates fuzzy dependent and independent variables.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit methodological development of an RD model.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses regression discontinuity designs based on birth-date eligibility to estimate direct and sibling spillover effects of HPV vaccination programmes.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HPV vaccination-programme application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Introduces a novel local-likelihood RD estimator, proposes a bandwidth-selection method, evaluates it in simulations, and applies it to HIV data.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Explicit RD estimator development and methodological evaluation.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Conducts regression discontinuity analysis to estimate pandemic-related changes in ART initiation and viral-load monitoring.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete multinational HIV-service application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Employs a fuzzy regression discontinuity design at Japan's age-based vaccine-priority threshold to estimate behavioral effects.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 vaccination application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies a regression discontinuity approach to routine data to estimate short-term HPV-vaccine adverse effects.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HPV vaccine-safety application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies regression discontinuity around South Africa's ART guideline change to estimate dolutegravir effects on suppression and retention.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HIV treatment-policy application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a regression discontinuity design at a zoster-vaccine birth-date eligibility threshold to estimate effects on dementia diagnoses.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete vaccination natural-experiment application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses regression discontinuity at Australia's zoster-vaccine eligibility threshold to estimate effects on dementia occurrence.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete vaccination quasi-experiment application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a regression discontinuity design to evaluate England's 2022 COVID-19 booster campaign in people around age 50.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses regression discontinuity at a birth-year cutoff to estimate appointment-letter effects on COVID-19 vaccine uptake.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Applies regression discontinuity at HPV catch-up eligibility cutoffs to estimate effects on cervical dysplasia and cancer.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete HPV vaccination-programme application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a fuzzy regression discontinuity design with pension-age eligibility as an instrument to estimate retirement's effect on vaccination uptake.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 vaccination application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Explicitly identifies itself as a correction to the fuzzy-regression-discontinuity article with DOI 10.1371/journal.pone.0305043.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Formal correction record for an application of the exact concept.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Uses a self-controlled risk-interval design comparing post-vaccination risk intervals with pre-vaccination control intervals.
decisions.lineage_evidence: Concrete COVID-19 vaccination application.

decisions.relationship_evidence: Tests SCRI robustness to time-varying unmeasured confounding using negative-control outcomes and quantitative bias analysis.
